projects.name: Bot-Auto-Commit
projects.description: Bot Auto Commit is a simple Python script that overwrites log.txt in a GitHub repo with a current timestamp and commits each update via the GitHub API. It reads a token from an env var or token.txt and can auto-detect the repo owner. Useful for testing CI, keeping repos active, or demonstrating API-based commits.
